ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Unique postal code for an area */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough that the postal code belongs to */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood associated with the postal code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the area */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the postal code in GeoJSON format */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the postal code record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the mayor of the borough */,
  "council_members" TEXT /* Names of the council members for the borough */,
  "borough_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough that the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the neighborhood */,
  "parks_and_recreation" INTEGER /* Number of parks and recreational facilities in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for geographical data record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood associated with this data */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Description of the land use type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent in the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residential_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residential unit record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood associated with the units */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total number of residential units in the neighborhood */,
  "vacant_units" INTEGER /* Number of vacant residential units in the neighborhood */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., rental, ownership) for the residential units */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Average price of the residential units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residential_units_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the service is located */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the service provider */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the city service */,
  "service_website" TEXT /* Website of the city service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_services_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, planner, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login for the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, data query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, region, country) of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood associated with this contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for neighborhood inquiries */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for neighborhood inquiries */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the neighborhood */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for neighborhood inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
